text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One night, as I'm walking along the<n>river...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna have a one-off,<n>all-or-nothin'. No
whinin' if you lose,<n>all right?

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black A
text_block_list.text: Tch, watch how you speak to Her<n>Holiness!

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Hush, now. It seems that we have a<n>guest... Not
just some stray, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
What do I find but a standoff between<n>an
Umamusume in a Tracen Academy<n>uniform and a
lady with an entourage<n>of figures in black!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: That badge... Heh. You're from the<n>academy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Everyone just relax. That goes for<n>you too,
Trainer. We're just gonna<n>have a friendly game.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's just a regular bout of<n>Concentration, me
versus her.

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black B
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any idea how lucky you<n>are? Even
VIPs need to wait their turn<n>for an audience with
Her Holi—

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh... Is that something you can<n>just freely
disclose to a random<n>passerby?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, you're right... Come now,<n>everyone.
Let's not trouble this<n>law-abiding citizen. This is a
match<n>between the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Well, there ya have it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Turn around and get going, before ya<n>find
yourself in too deep.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by "in too deep"?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I mean, take a good look around you.<n>Ya don't
belong here.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If ya get what I'm sayin', scurry on<n>home. You
wouldn't wanna go and<n>spoil that nice career of
yours, would<n>ya?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The line of black-clad figures<n>continues to glare
at me. If looks<n>could kill... It seems like they might
actually be denizens of society's<n>underbelly.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
However, a Tracen Academy student<n>is right
here in front of me. I have no<n>doubt she runs to
realize her dreams.<n>As a trainer, there's only one
thing I<n>can do...
choice_data_list:
There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!

There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
However, a Tracen Academy student<n>is right
here in front of me. I have no<n>doubt she runs to
realize her dreams.<n>As a trainer, there's only one
thing I<n>can do...
choice_data_list:
There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!

There's no way I can look the other way! Let me
handle this!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!
Let's get out of here as fast as we can!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Um, were ya listening to a single<n>word I said?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Drop the act. Ya don't have what it<n>takes to help
anyone.
choice_data_list:
It's a trainer's job to be there for any
Umamusume!

It's a trainer's job to be there for any
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You're no more than a fool if you'd<n>go to such
lengths for someone you<n>just met.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...You're just intent on putting a<n>damper on
things, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...I'm outta here. It seems today's not<n>the day.

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black C
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What the hell? You said this<n>was the only
day you had time!

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
...I don't mind. There's no point if<n>you're not in
the mood for it. After all,<n>I want to face you at
your best.

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black B
text_block_list.text: ...If that's how you feel...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
My game was interrupted and I've<n>got
practically nothing to show for it.<n>What a waste of
a night.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Still, it's been some time since I sawa scene like that... Heh. See yaaround, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Leggo of me! Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Figures in Black
text_block_list.text: Where'd they go?! Leave no stone<n>unturned!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch! The hell'd ya do that for?!<n>Things were just
about to get<n>interesting! I was right on the edge!
choice_data_list: We're even more on the edge right now.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Whaddya mean?
choice_data_list:
I mean, we're in deep trouble if we get caught,
right?

I mean, we're in deep trouble if we get caught,
right?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Hahaha! Looks like we really<n>are cut
from the same cloth.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: (Whoa!)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Thrilling stuff. We either make a clean<n>getaway
or we get caught. A nice and<n>simple gamble with
everything on the<n>line.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Now, hold on tight!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...And we've crossed the finish line.<n>I've pulled
off a daring escape,<n>joined by an addlebrained
trainer...<n>Haha.
